name: linSendBitStream
title: linSendBitStream
syntax: long linSendBitStream(byte bitStream[], long numberOfBits); // form 1
long linSendBitStream(byte bitStream[], long numberOfBits, long timeoutPrevention); // form 2
description: Sends an arbitrary bit stream on the LIN bus.

parameters.name: bitStream
parameters.description: The bit stream to be sent. Maximum number of bits: 2^31-1.

parameters.name: numberOfBits
parameters.description: The number of bits in the bitStream-array.

parameters.name: timeoutPrevention
parameters.description: 0: deactivates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver. 1: activates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver.

return: On success a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: This function sends LIN header as a bit stream

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
